creator: shoesoft@gmx.net
text:
After updating the ports tree today, qt5-quick package fails with:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-quick/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/Qt5Quick.pc: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-quick/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/Qt5QuickTest.pc: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-quick/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/Qt5QuickWidgets.pc: No such file or directory
